productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Black Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of this truely Italian franco leone leather sandals. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide forefoot, midfoot and back foot leather straps to lock the foot in place in absolute comfortForefoot and midfoot straps connected on the upper with a leather a twill fabric patchConcealed elasticated gusset at the medial side of the backfoot strap to offer a customised Fit and lock the foot in placeButton embellishments on the midfoot patch and backfoot strap ends for styleErgonomically padded leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole textured with leaf skeleton grooves on the forefoot and heel, with suction points on the front forefoot and back heel for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
